jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Barista
jsonLd.description:
Barista is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Barista:
Barista is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Barista!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
